programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: During the matchup between the New Orleans Saints and the Minnesota Vikings, a last-minute 61-yard touchdown by Stefon Diggs gave Minnesota a 29-24 victory over New Orleans to send the Vikings to the NFC championship game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: DeSean Jackson scored on a 65-yard punt return on the final play of the game and the Philadelphia Eagles scored 28 points in the final 7:28 to stun the New York Giants 38-31 Sunday and take over first place in the NFC East.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Tipped Hail Mary allows Jacksonville Jaguars to escape with victory over Houston Texans.

programme.title: NFL Daily
programme.desc: Gregg Rosenthal and a rotating crew of elite NFL Media co-hosts get you caught up daily on all the NFL news and analysis ahead of ___ during the 2026 NFL season.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Aaron Rodgers throws a 36-yard pass to a toe-dragging Jared Cook on the sideline, and Mason Crosby kicked a 51-yard field goal as time expired to defeat the Cowboys, sending the Packers to the NFC Championship game.

programme.desc: A young woman whose passion for American football helped make her a pioneer of the game in her home country of Italy, and took her from Milan to Minnesota for a memorable Super Bowl LII.

programme.title: NFL 360
programme.desc: This episode spotlights the story of Ashton Washington, a trailblazer who became the first female scout in the century-plus history of the Chicago Bears, Drew Brees' involvement in the girls' flag football movement, and more.

programme.title: NFL 360

programme.desc: A special 'Women in Football' episode features a Moroccan athlete overcoming incredible challenges to launch a girls football academy, and Saints owner Gayle Benson making a dramatic impact on the city of New Orleans.

programme.title: Breaking Down Your Practice Routine

programme.title: Breaking Down Your Practice Routine
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake reveals where everyone's practice should begin, shows how to create a feedback station and teaches the six key stages for learning new swing movements.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers want to get the most out of the driver. They demonstrate what the pros look like at impact and share what to do to get into that position.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward cover all things long game from fairway metals to hybrids and even how to master the dreaded long irons. They also teach how finding the low point in the swing helps create consistent strikes.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain the big three in iron play: how to control distance, accuracy, and trajectory on shots. They also show a footwork drill to help ball striking and what to do to work the ball into those tucked pins.

programme.desc: Teams face off in Blackjack as tensions begin to rise and a player's confidence begins to dwindle.

programme.desc: The competition intensifies as teams merge and the focus on individuals is magnified.

programme.desc: Some unfinished business is settled, leaving one player fighting for survival.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain how to dial in distances with short irons and how to hit them on line every time; they also explain the bounce angle and how to choose the right amount.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers show how to play a variety of shots around the green, including the high spinning chip, low runner, and many more. They also explain the importance of focusing on a landing zone when hitting greenside shots.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain the necessary fundamentals to hit effective greenside and fairway bunker shots. They also explain how to hit it close from one of the most feared shots in the game, the 30-40-yard bunker shot.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Me and My Golf's Andy and Piers explain how to master judging speed and reads on the greens. They also demonstrate the proper mechanics for hitting it solid and making those clutch putts.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2011 Masters Champion Charl Schwartzel joins Jim "Bones" Mackay and shares the tips and strategies that led him to over 10 victories across the PGA TOUR and European Tour. Charl gives insight into his Par-5 "lay-up" vs "go for it" checklist.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2019 NCAA National Championship winner and 2021 PGA TOUR rookie Kris Ventura shares the tips and strategies that have led to his success. Ventura goes in depth on his green reading and putting strategy, which begins before he steps onto the green.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2011 PGA Championship and multi-time PGA TOUR winner, Keegan Bradley, joins Bones on the course and shares the tips and strategies that have led to his impressive career. Keegan gives unique advice on how he "sees the field" off the tee.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2018 NCAA Division I champion and current LPGA player Haley Moore shares the tips and strategies that have helped her succeed. Moore goes in depth on her green reading process and gives tips on how to adjust for uphill and downhill lies in the rough.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: LPGA standout Jaye Marie Green joins Bones on the course and shares her tips and strategies that have led to her impressive professional career. Lessons include a break down of her lag putting process, how to hit it high over the trouble, and more.
